Bash(node -e 'const p = require\("./package-lock.json"\); console.log\("root react:", p.packages[""].dependencies?.react\); console.log\("root react-dom:", p.packages[""].dependencies?.["react-dom"]\); console.log\("next version:", p.packages["node_modules/next"]?.version\); console.log\("react-dom installed:", p.packages["node_modules/react-dom"]?.version\);')

Bash(node -e 'const p = require\("./package-lock.json"\); for \(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(p.packages\)\) { if \(k.startsWith\("node_modules/react"\) && !k.includes\("/"\)\) continue; if \(k.match\(/^node_modules\\/react\(-dom\)?$/\)\) console.log\(k, "=", v.version\); }')
